data.body:
[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Commissions & Missions (Hard) will be tripled.
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports, Credit Points and Elephs!

🗓️Period: 2/20 (Mon) 19:00 – 2/27 (Mon) 18:59 (UTC)
